title: fragrant fried thai chicken noodles
description: a lacto-vegetarian friendly, bangkok-street inspired thai dish featuring crispy, jammy noodles and chicken.
instructions: heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
in the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
add the soy sauce, fish sauce, sherry, and brown sugar to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the sauce.
add the cooked chicken back to the skillet and toss to combine with the noodles and sauce.
season with salt and pepper to taste.
transfer the noodles and chicken to a serving platter and garnish with chili flakes, if desired.
